## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Shaped and GrowthX to discuss content production and Figma access issues.](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Figma access resolved: Copy/paste method for editing view-only templates](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Aggressive content push: Aim to publish 20+ blogs by Monday, prioritizing volume over perfection](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Image strategy: Add screenshots/figures selectively, focus on high-performing content later](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Alignment on "publish first, optimize later" approach for faster content output](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Topics

### Figma Access Resolution

  - [Issue: GrowthX team had view-only access to Shaped's blog templates](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Solution: Copy all elements, paste into own Figma space for full editability](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Export tip: Use 3x PNG export for high-quality images](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Jakub copied templates, granting team access for immediate use](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

### Content Production Strategy

  - [Focus: Ramping up production and publishing quickly, especially for top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Goal: Publish at least 20 blogs by Monday, then continue increasing output](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Approach: "Err on the side of doing more" rather than perfecting each piece](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Images: Initially focus on essential screenshots (e.g., research papers), optimize later](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=359.0)

### Image Insertion Technique

  - [For research-heavy content: Use Google AI Studio to suggest relevant paper screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [AI provides placement recommendations and captions (e.g., "Figure X.Y from the paper")](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Adds validity and depth to content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### Publishing Workflow

  - [David to keep content in draft initially](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Team aligned on "publish first, optimize later" approach](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Jakub: "Let's just apply an action... we can fix something backwards"](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Nic: "Feel free to ask for forgiveness rather than permission"](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to start creating content using new Figma access](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Aim to publish 20+ blogs by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Focus on volume, worry less about perfecting images/formatting initially](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Review performance data to identify high-performing content for future optimization](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Continue aggressive content push, prioritizing speed and quantity](https://fathom.video/share/QsmeyyjxGADEHZ8hxR_4Nzvq5cBXcsKw?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
